title: Julie's Cookies and Cream Cheesecake
ingredients: 3 packages (8 ounces each) Philadelphia cream cheese, room temperature
1½ cups Oreo cookies, broken into large pieces
instructions: Combine cookie crumbs, sugar, and melted butter.
Press mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan and about 2 inches up the sides.
Beat cream cheese until light and fluffy.
Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
Gently fold in broken cookie pieces.
While cheesecake bakes, mix sour cream, vanilla extract, and sugar until smooth.
Remove cheesecake from oven and let rest 15 minutes.
Pour topping evenly over cheesecake and return to oven.
Remove from oven and cool on a wire rack.
Garnish with whipped cream and mini Oreos if desired.
notes: All ingredients (cream cheese and eggs) should be at room temperature for best results
Optional garnish: whipped cream and mini Oreos
